member.name: T:Sales_Management_System.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Sales_Management_System.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Sales_Management_System.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.name: T:Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager
member.summary: TableAdapterManager is used to coordinate TableAdapters in the dataset to enable Hierarchical Update scenarios

member.name: M:Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateUpdatedRows(Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Update rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateInsertedRows(Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Insert rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateDeletedRows(Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Delete rows in bottom-up order.

member.name: M:Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.GetRealUpdatedRows(System.Data.DataRow[],System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Remove inserted rows that become updated rows after calling TableAdapter.Update(inserted rows) first

member.name: M:Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateAll(Sales_Management_System.MyInventoryDataSet)
member.summary: Update all changes to the dataset.
